title: T-027 — Wiring: Schema-driven L3 extension propagation from 02-SETTINGS
prompt: Per §6.3 + KPI 'schema-driven extensions propagate within 5s'. Implement listener that subscribes to reference_schemas changes for entity='items' (02-SETTINGS §6) and rebuilds the runtime Zod schema used by item-create/edit endpoints. Cache invalidation broadcast via existing in-process pub/sub or NATS-style channel. RED tests/wiring/schema-propagation.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/wiring/schema-propagation.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Listener that rebuilds item Zod schema when 02-SETTINGS reference_schemas change.
pipeline_inputs.details: Use existing internal event bus. After change emit, subsequent POST /items must validate against new schema. Cache TTL <=5s for KPI compliance.
acceptance_criteria: Given reference_schemas adds field 'organic_certified', when POST /items omits it but it's required, then 422 within 5s of schema change.
Given schema removed, when POST runs, then field is no longer required.
Given cache invalidation event missed, when TTL expires, then schema reload still occurs within 5s.
test_strategy: RED tests with simulated schema mutation + timing.
risk_red_lines: Do not require app restart — must hot-reload.
